understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the KA59 puzzle game by solving each level within the step budget, where a level is won only when every goal tile marked '+' is occupied simultaneously by a selectable piece.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shifted only the currently selected piece by one 3-pixel grid cell in the chosen direction, subject to collisions and boundary behavior; adjacent pushable objects could be pushed along if there was space, while walls blocked or constrained movement (with some walls/boundaries having non-obvious behavior that required testing). When multiple selectables existed, CLICK with an exact pixel-coordinate target_position switched control to the selectable at that position, and the movement_blocked flags were only heuristic indicators of nearby objects and not a guaranteed predictor of whether the move would succeed.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | Although marked blocked by a wall, try moving right to test for wrap/teleport or nonstandard wall interaction.
history.reasoning: Although marked blocked by a wall, try moving right to test for wrap/teleport or nonstandard wall interaction.

history.summary: Turn 2: MOVE_RIGHT | Test whether the adjacent wall actually blocks movement; some walls allow passing or special interactions.
history.reasoning: Test whether the adjacent wall actually blocks movement; some walls allow passing or special interactions.

history.summary: Turn 3: MOVE_RIGHT | Try pushing the adjacent selectable right to create space and test if movement/pushing is possible toward the inner wall.
history.reasoning: Try pushing the adjacent selectable right to create space and test if movement/pushing is possible toward the inner wall.

history.summary: Turn 4: CLICK | The current selectable is boxed in by walls; switch control to the other selectable near the goal area to try to occupy the goal and finish the level.
history.reasoning: The current selectable is boxed in by walls; switch control to the other selectable near the goal area to try to occupy the goal and finish the level.

history.summary: Turn 5: MOVE_UP | Try moving into the adjacent goal region above; goals are non-collidable so this may succeed despite the blocked hint.
history.reasoning: Try moving into the adjacent goal region above; goals are non-collidable so this may succeed despite the blocked hint.

history.summary: Turn 6: MOVE_RIGHT | Try moving into the adjacent goal area; goals are non-collidable so this should place the selectable onto it despite the blocked hint.
history.reasoning: Try moving into the adjacent goal area; goals are non-collidable so this should place the selectable onto it despite the blocked hint.
